item.title: Justice found after 35 years in a child case

item.title: A family of eleven lost in minutes

item.title: Family's Life Ended After Leaving a Window Open
item.description: A family’s life ended after leaving a window open, in a case that highlights how a small decision can have tragic consequences.

media:content.media:description: A family’s life ended after leaving a window open, in a case that highlights how a small decision can have tragic consequences.
